title: Day 1: What is Personal Branding?
content: Why your reputation is your greatest asset.
exercise: Google yourself and note what first impression someone would get from the results.

title: Day 2: Defining Your Values & Mission
content: What do you stand for and who do you serve?
exercise: Write down 3 core values that guide your life and work.

title: Day 3: Identifying Your Unique Value Proposition
content: What makes you different from everyone else?
exercise: Complete the sentence: 'I am the only [job title] who [unique quality/result] for [target audience].'

title: Day 4: Visual Identity basics
content: Colors, fonts, and photos that represent you.
exercise: Create a mood board for your personal brand using 2 fonts and 3 colors.

title: Day 5: The Professional Headshot
content: First impressions in a digital world.
exercise: Take a new profile photo with good lighting and a clean background.

title: Day 6: Optimized LinkedIn Profile
content: Turning your profile into a landing page.
exercise: Write a keyword-optimized headline for your LinkedIn profile.

title: Day 7: Storytelling for Branding
content: Using your journey to connect with others.
exercise: Draft your 'Origin Story' – why you do what you do today.

title: Day 8: Content Strategy for Personal Brand
content: What to post and where to post it.
exercise: Select one primary platform (LinkedIn, X, IG) and plan 3 post topics for it.

title: Day 9: Establishing Authority
content: Consistent value delivery vs. self-promotion.
exercise: Write an educational post that teaches something helpful to your audience.

title: Day 10: Networking & Strategic Connections
content: Who you know vs. who knows you.
exercise: Connect with 5 people in your industry and send a personalized intro message.

title: Day 11: Intro to Public Speaking
content: Overcoming the fear and finding your voice.
exercise: Record a 1-minute video of yourself introducing yourself and watch it back.

title: Day 12: Structuring Your Talk
content: Hook, Body, and Call to Action.
exercise: Outline a 5-minute presentation on a topic you are passionate about.

title: Day 13: The Power of Body Language
content: Presence, gestures, and eye contact.
exercise: Practice your talk in front of a mirror and notice your posture and gestures.

title: Day 14: Voice & Vocal Variety
content: Tone, pace, and projection.
exercise: Record yourself reading a paragraph and experiment with different speeds and volumes.

title: Day 15: Using Visual Aids (Slides)
content: Less is more: Making your slides support, not distract.
exercise: Create 3 simple slides for your 5-minute talk using high-quality images.

title: Day 16: Handling Q&A
content: Staying calm and providing concise answers.
exercise: Anticipate 3 questions you might get after your talk and draft your answers.

title: Day 17: Public Speaking on Camera
content: Mastering webinars, YouTube, and Zoom.
exercise: Host a short 5-minute live stream or record a video for social media.

title: Day 18: Storytelling Technique: The Hero's Journey
content: Making your audience the hero.
exercise: Rewrite a case study or testimonial using the Hero's Journey framework.

title: Day 19: Handling Mistakes and Nerves
content: What to do when you forget your lines.
exercise: Practice a 'recovery bridge' – a phrase you can use if you lose your place (e.g., 'Now, another thing to consider...').

title: Day 20: Building a Community
content: Engaging with your audience and growing your reach.
exercise: Respond to every comment on one of your social posts with a thoughtful reply.

title: Day 21: Podcasting & Interviews
content: Being a great guest and host.
exercise: Research 3 podcasts in your niche and identify their typical guest format.

title: Day 22: Developing a Signature Talk
content: The one message you want to be known for.
exercise: Draft the 'Key Message' or 'Big Idea' for your signature talk.

title: Day 23: Managing Your Online Reputation
content: Responding to feedback and negative comments.
exercise: Find a critical comment on a post in your niche and write a professional, constructive response.

title: Day 24: Establishing Thought Leadership
content: Writing articles and white papers.
exercise: Sketch the outline for an 800-word article on a major trend in your industry.

title: Day 25: PR & Media Outreach
content: Getting featured in the press and on blogs.
exercise: Identify 3 publications where your target audience hangs out.

title: Day 26: Consistency & Daily Habits
content: Showing up even when you don't feel like it.
exercise: Establish a 'Brand Maintenance' ritual (e.g., 20 mins of engagement every morning).

title: Day 27: Monetizing Your Personal Brand
content: From reputation to revenue.
exercise: Identify one digital product or service you could offer based on your brand authority.

title: Day 28: Developing your Speaker One-Sheet
content: The marketing doc for getting booking.
exercise: Draft the 'Bio' and 'Topic List' for your speaker one-sheet.

title: Day 29: Final Project: The Brand Launch
content: Putting it all together for your debut.
exercise: Create a 'Launch Campaign' – 3 posts, a new bio, and a 1-minute video introducing the 'New You'.

title: Day 30: Graduation and Future Vision
content: The lifelong journey of personal growth.
exercise: Set a goal for where you want your personal brand to be in 12 months.
